name: School Bus Simulator 3D
description: School Bus Simulator 3D is an exciting bus driving game and realistic driving simulator where you become a professional city bus driver. Enjoy real drive 3D in detailed 3D environments with dynamic weather, day & night cycle, and smooth driving controls. Pick and drop passengers, complete school routes, master bus parking, and explore city driving games and off-road bus simulator modes. Experience coach bus simulator gameplay, multiple camera views, fuel management, and immersive sound effects in this ultimate 3D bus game adventure.
instructions: WASD OR Arrow keys for movement or tap to play
